action_set_definitions.name: get_system_overview
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time, a list of active disruptions (including location, severity, and estimated clearance time), and the total count of available standby units in the depot.

action_set_definitions.name: get_corridor_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Returns current performance data (HDF and TDI) for a specific range of stops.

action_set_definitions.name: list_vehicles_on_route
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time status for all vehicles on a specific route, including current stop, passenger load, and position relative to any blockages.

action_set_definitions.name: dispatch_standby_unit
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches a single standby unit from the depot to enter service at a specific stop.

insertion_stop.description: Stop ID where the vehicle begins its route.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_vehicle_intervention
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a recovery command on a specific vehicle. Note: Commands fail if Route Crowding Ratio (RCR) is >= 0.80.

turn_at_stop.description: Required for Short_Turn; the stop where the vehicle will reverse.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_sim_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation clock by a specific number of minutes to allow interventions to process.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_final_report
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the task by reporting current HDF metrics and a summary of recovery status.

state_description.current_sim_time: The current simulation timestamp in HH:MM:SS format.
state_description.active_vehicles: List of all vehicles currently in service, including their current stop, delay status, and passenger load.
state_description.stop_congestion_levels: A mapping of stop IDs to a congestion score (0.0 to 1.0) representing passenger density on the platform.
state_description.available_standby_units: Number of spare vehicles and drivers available in the depot for emergency dispatch.
state_description.active_disruptions: Current incidents affecting the network (e.g., roadwork, mechanical failure).
